message:
fix(security): close monorepo escape path traversal bypass

Replace fs::canonicalize fallback chain in detect_monorepo_escape with
safe_canonicalize, which resolves .. and . segments logically without
requiring the path to exist on disk. This closes a path traversal
bypass where extension specifiers referencing non-existent intermediate
directories could escape the monorepo root.

Also: replace prop_filter+unwrap with prop_filter_map in OpenAI and
Gemini proptest generators to eliminate guarded unwrap calls, and add
descriptive messages to panic!() in 13 CLI test match arms for better
failure diagnostics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
